description.value:
An insulated suit for extreme environments with hydration reclamation and temperature control.

Effect: +20 to Tests against extreme environments. Good and Best Craftsmanship grant +25 and +30 respectively. Poor suits only last three days before needing removal from the environment to recharge.

Notes: -
